data.body: ddbe change 558: LLM-Review +1 (PASS, 4 advisory non-blocking). Verified/CI still running (GHA 29175337339). 4e9d plan-review: round 1 PASS(0 block/10 advisory) - remediated valid advisories: corrected reducer sites (process_create/comment/revert/signature not edit/status), delete.py seam-bypass now stamped, added ACs for reduced-state+cache+author_email-failure, extracted shared _git_config helper, clarified resolve_current_identity(*, repo_root=None). Re-running review to re-sign.
